goal: B5: 修复 #19 (HTTP 代理加固) + #20 (preload.cjs 补充) + #21 (Provider 配置统一)

coverage_checklist.proxy_timeout: assert: main.cjs HTTP 代理添加请求超时(30s)
coverage_checklist.proxy_body_limit: assert: main.cjs 添加请求体大小限制(10MB)
coverage_checklist.proxy_cors_lock: assert: main.cjs CORS 限制为具体来源
coverage_checklist.preload_ready_fixed: assert: main.cjs 发送 ready 事件或 preload 移除死代码
coverage_checklist.preload_ipc_basic: assert: preload.cjs 添加基本窗口控制 API
coverage_checklist.provider_config_centralized: assert: Provider 端点配置统一到 constants.ts
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.test_pass: assert: bun run test 通过
